title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

year.rationale: Provides temporal context for the research.

abstract.rationale: Offers a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform where the research was presented.

problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the specific challenge the research aims to solve.

methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to address the problem.

method_name.rationale: Identifies the specific technique introduced in the research.

components.description: List of key components or techniques used
components.rationale: Highlights important elements that make up the methodology.

algorithm.rationale: Provides details on the computational process involved.

experiments.rationale: Describes the validation of the proposed methods.

datasets.description: List of datasets used for experiments
datasets.rationale: Indicates the data sources for evaluating the methods.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Defines the criteria for assessing the results.

results.rationale: Presents the outcomes of the experiments conducted.

performance.rationale: Quantifies the effectiveness of the method.

comparisons.rationale: Shows how the proposed method fares against existing techniques.

results.rationale: Summarizes the key insights and implications of the study.

main_conclusions.description: Key conclusions drawn from the research

implications.description: Implications for future research or applications
implications.rationale: Discusses the impact of findings on the field.

reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Ensures that others can replicate the research findings.

data_availability.rationale: Indicates how others can obtain the datasets used.

environment.rationale: Specifies the setup required to reproduce the experiments.
